KPI Bluebook
  • KPI069
  • View page source

KPI069

\[\text{}\]
Open in: VS Code PyCharm Edit
Description
  • KPI069 is a key performance indicator used to assess process efficiency and operational performance
Objective
  • The objective of KPI069 is to provide a clear measure that supports monitoring
  • decision making
  • and continuous improvement
Formula

Calculated directly from the inputs found in the code implementation.

$$ \mathit{Service\,Factor} = \frac{\mathit{Sum(On\,Time\,Orders)}}{\mathit{Sum(Total\,Orders)}} \times 100 $$
  • Sum(On Time Orders): The numerator of the fraction.
  • Sum(Total Orders): The denominator of the fraction.
Generation time 50.0s (AI 50.0s + Render 0.0s)
Total: 49.975s • AI: 49.975s • Render: 0.0s
Extraction rate % 88.9%
Error rate % 11.1%
Used in KPI(s)
  • This KPI can serve as an input to higher-level operational and performance dashboards
Input Measure
  • Derived from the variables used in the code calculation for this KPI
Unit of Measure %
Reporting Source Operations data sources such as historians, SCADA/DCS tags, and production logs.
Comments No additional comments or special considerations were provided for this KPI.

Code Context

1-- KPI069: % Service Factor

SELECT (SUM(on_time_orders) / SUM(total_orders)) * 100 AS ServiceFactor FROM orders;
